name: rate-family-v2
description: Rate Family V2 — multi-tenant insurance & finance comparison platform (frontend + mock backend, one repo). Everything is mock data.

scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:backend && npm run build:app
scripts.build:backend: npm run build:contracts && npm run build --workspace=@ratefamily/api
scripts.dev:backend: npm run build:contracts && npm run dev --workspace=@ratefamily/api
scripts.test:backend: npm run build:backend && npm run test --workspace=@ratefamily/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:backend && (cd app && npx tsc --noEmit)
